message:
test(actor): B10 wave 2 invariant tests for actor module

Adds 4 invariant tests to actor.rs:

- actor_state_cell_encode_decode_roundtrip: all 4 states roundtrip
  correctly, unknown u8 values (4+) fail-safe to Stopped
- mailbox_config_defaults: default config has documented capacity
  (DEFAULT_MAILBOX_CAPACITY) and backpressure enabled
- actor_try_send_full_mailbox_returns_error: capacity enforcement
  invariant - try_send on a full mailbox returns error without blocking
- actor_context_with_parent_supervisor: parent supervisor is accessible
  and has_parent() reports true when set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
